children.text: the term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Energy;

the term “domestic company” means a company which is substantially involved in the United States domestic production, processing, or use of steel, aluminum, copper, or other metals and has a substantial percentage of its operations located within the United States;

the terms “management plan” and “plan” mean the Steel Initiative Management Plan issued on , by the Department of Energy, which establishes the management framework for the steel research and development initiative, and updates to that plan; andApril 1, 1987
the term “research plan” means the Steel Initiative Research Plan issued in April 1988 by the Department of Energy, and updates to that plan.
